productDisplayName: Skechers Men's Raiser Choco Flip Flop
description: Stylish and uber cool, these casual Raiser flip flops from skechers add an extra bounce to your steps. The skull print on the spongy footbed is perfect for all you bad boys out there. Ideal for all-day wear, this pair creates an absolutely chilled look. Team it with jeans or shorts for a wow effect.Upper Wide fabric thong straps for added durability and style Fabric toe separator for improved comfort Fringes on the edges of the straps for a rugged look Thread detailing for added structure and style Brand badge on strap Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and support Foam footbed for in-step comfort and all-day wear Ergonomically designed for walking ease Graphic print on the footbed for added attraction Outsole Slip-resistant durable rubber outsole for better shock absorption arrow shaped lugs in either direction for improved grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
